title: dryopteris extensa
intro: Dryopteris extensa, also known as the buckler fern or male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Dryopteris extensa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. Dryopteris extensa is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
